summary: Park stalled worker task before restart.
target_task: Built-in supervisor fallback: daemon process is not running but status is still calling_llm on Task checkbox-294: Add generated blocked-cascade daemon-repair coverage for tranche 13 item 1 proving blocked PP&D work stays parked until a fresh daemon repair task validates., and 2 recent failure diagnostic(s) already exist for that target; park the task before restart instead of resetting it into another immediate retry
validation_commands: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
